runTitle: Local Legacy RAG RPC Cleanup Docs and Test Hardening QA
coveredSurfaces: Supabase legacy RAG RPC cleanup migration
Knowledge Retrieval Lite live RPC smoke
root and AI Engine local gates

completedImprovements.title: Make legacy RAG RPC cleanup dependency-safe
completedImprovements.evidence: supabase/migrations/20260510011500_drop_legacy_vector_graph_rag_rpcs.sql now uses DROP FUNCTION ... RESTRICT and skips null to_regprocedure values.

completedImprovements.title: Expand Supabase migration contract coverage
completedImprovements.evidence: tests/unit/dev/supabase-security-hardening-contract.test.ts now asserts RESTRICT, no CASCADE, idempotent null skip, and table/column preservation.

completedImprovements.title: Document pre/post Supabase DDL checks
completedImprovements.evidence: docs/reference/architecture/infrastructure/database.md now includes the pre/post to_regprocedure query and post-apply npm run supabase:rag:smoke check.

completedImprovements.title: Confirm live legacy RPC functions have no dependent objects
completedImprovements.evidence: Supabase read-only pg_depend query returned zero dependent objects for the six legacy vector/graph RAG RPC functions.

notes: This run does not apply DDL to the live Supabase database.
Live KRL smoke passed with search_knowledge_text:cpu rows=3 and search_knowledge_text:redis-memory rows=3.
AI Engine full test passed: 106 files, 1078 tests.
